text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Sakura Chiyono O contacts me to let me
know she's going to be late for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are plenty of tasks I can do on my own until
she gets here. I'm getting things ready for her
arrival when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Look! Maruzensky's running!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huff...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wow! She's so cool! But... is it just me, or does her
running lack the oomph it used to have? Maybe it's just
my imagination...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Dummy. It's been a while since she's run, so of course
she can't go full tilt right away.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I bet she's running at 70% capacity or so until she gets
back into the groove of things.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that makes sense! I can't wait to see her when she's
at full power again!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... If only that were the case...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So my full-out sprint just looks like a warm-up jog
to others now...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...But they're right. This isn't me. The Umamusume
Chiyo looks up to is better than this...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Time to clean the rust off my gears!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry I'm late, Trainer! Let's have a good
day of training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there sure are a lot of people around
today! Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: WHAAAT?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Why didn't you message me?! I wanted to watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O starts trembling like a puppy.
It's been a long time since I've seen her like this.
choice_data_list: You really look up to Maruzensky, huh?
You really look up to Maruzensky, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Of course I do. I wouldn't try so hard to be like
her if I didn't.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Back when I was ready to give up and accept my
fate as an average Umamusume, she showed me a
future where I blossom.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And you...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're the one helping me toward that future.
Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer.
choice_data_list:
Were you late because you were busy making
this?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...What?! No, um, I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Please just accept the gift and don't worry about
how it might be connected with my lateness...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
B-but I suppose that doesn't make things any less
awkward... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! In exchange for you accepting this,
can I ask you for a favor?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Could you please tell me what Maruzen's running
was like?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If you tell me, we can count that as your return
gift for these chocolates. What do you think?
choice_data_list: Are you sure that's all you want?
Are you sure that's all you want?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! But you have to tell me everything in full
detail!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I try to describe Maruzensky's running to
Sakura Chiyono O in as much detail as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I try to describe Maruzensky's running to
Sakura Chiyono O in as much detail as possible.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whew... That was a lot of work. I guess that's it
for training today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll see you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Sakura Chiyono O waves goodbye, I suddenly
remember the chocolates from her in my pocket.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Let me treat you to something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Munch! Gulp! Phew! This sure is delicious.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Are you sure you're okay with paying for this?
choice_data_list: It's not a problem at all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I can't believe I'm getting treated to meat
buns in exchange for giving you chocolate. I'm so
lucky!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Thank you so much for the treat. We even
finished eating at the same time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. True...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: How about we get one more? I'll split it with you.
choice_data_list:
No need to hold back. You can get another bun
for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow! Are you sure?! Yayyy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll get a chocolate bun, since it's
Valentine's Day and everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O turns to dash off to the
convenience store, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stumbles and nearly does a face plant. In the
nick of time, I grab her shoulders and pull her
back up.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sorry... My legs got all tangled up...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know... I can't believe I just did something so
silly in front of you...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... The way you saved me just now... It made
you seem even cooler than usual.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I got to see such an awesome side of you
today, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Hey, don't get too carried away.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okaaay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch over Sakura Chiyono O to make sure she
doesn't trip again on our way back to the
academy.
